_instructions: Add your work experience here. Copy the experience object for each job.

experiences.title: Supply Chain Analyst
experiences.description:
• Increased inventory reporting accuracy by 28% through redesigned Power BI dashboards tracking stock levels, shipment movement, warehouse productivity, transportation metrics, and order fulfillment performance across regional distribution operations.
• Reduced stock imbalance issues by 22% after analyzing replenishment cycles, inventory utilization trends, and SKU-level movement data, improving inventory allocation and product availability across warehouse and distribution operations.
• Lowered shipment delay escalations by 18% by improving transportation scheduling visibility, shipment tracking accuracy, and coordination between logistics, warehouse, and procurement teams supporting regional distribution activities.
• Improved forecast alignment by 16% through analysis of sales history, inventory consumption patterns, replenishment trends, and demand fluctuations supporting inventory planning and procurement decision making processes.
• Reduced manual reporting effort by 40% after automating inventory, procurement, logistics, and operational reports using SQL, Excel formulas, and Power Query workflows supporting supply chain reporting activities.
• Decreased recurring fulfillment exceptions by 21% through shipment analysis, inventory reconciliation, and operational issue tracking, helping teams resolve supply chain gaps affecting warehouse and transportation performance metrics.
• Accelerated operational reporting turnaround by 35% through SQL-based inventory aging, transportation analysis, warehouse throughput reporting, and procurement tracking supporting supply chain performance monitoring and operational reviews.
• Improved supplier delivery compliance by 17% through purchase order analysis, lead-time tracking, and vendor performance reporting supporting procurement planning and fulfillment continuity across supply chain operations.

experiences.title: Supply Chain Analyst
experiences.description:
• Improved operational reporting accuracy by 26% through analysis of procurement, logistics, inventory, and order management data supporting daily supply chain planning and operational decision-making activities.
• Reduced reporting turnaround time by 31% after developing Power BI dashboards tracking shipment status, warehouse metrics, procurement cycles, supplier performance, and inventory utilization across operational workflows.
• Increased reporting efficiency by 29% through SQL-based extraction, validation, and transformation of ERP operational datasets supporting inventory reporting, procurement analysis, and supply chain performance tracking activities.
• Reduced inventory reconciliation discrepancies by 19% through SKU-level reporting, stock movement analysis, and operational data validation improving reporting consistency across warehouse and inventory management operations.
• Lowered shipment coordination delays by 15% through purchase order tracking, transportation timeline monitoring, and supplier schedule analysis supporting fulfillment continuity across procurement and logistics operational activities.
• Improved replenishment planning accuracy by 18% after analyzing inventory trends, sales history, forecast variance reports, and procurement requirements supporting inventory allocation and planning activities across operational environments.
• Reduced manual reporting workload by 37% after automating recurring dashboard refresh activities, operational summaries, and reporting workflows using Excel formulas, Power Query transformations, and standardized templates.
• Improved ERP data reliability by 23% through transactional audits, inventory validation, reconciliation activities, and exception monitoring supporting accurate operational reporting across procurement and warehouse systems.
